title: bus.redis.consumer.lag v1
description: Consumer group position report — emitted by tachyonac-engine and any XREADGROUP subscriber on a heartbeat schedule. Lets ops dashboards detect stuck consumers, replay lag, and missed-event windows without querying Redis directly.

consumer_name.description: Individual consumer name within the group

last_delivered_id.description: Stream ID of the last acknowledged message

pending_count.description: Messages delivered but not yet ACK'd (PEL size)

lag.description: Entries in stream not yet delivered to this group

processed_total.description: Total messages processed since group creation
